CustomField.description: Marker for B13 migration records. TRUE means this ActionPlan was generated by FscGoalMigrate to attach to a legacy FinServ__FinancialGoal__c that classified as a wealth-advisor playbook or commercial banking action.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-managed by FscGoalMigrate. TRUE means this is generated demo data; do not edit.
CustomField.label: Is Seeded Migration
